title: Change Status When Due Date has passed
excerpt:
Hi There 
I’m new to Monday.com and am trying to automate a change in status when a Due Date has passed. I’ve tried using one of the automations, but this hasn’t worked! Any other suggestions? 
  
Thanks

posts.author: DebbieNE (Deb)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi There

I’m new to Monday.com and am trying to automate a change in status when a Due Date has passed. I’ve tried using one of the automations, but this hasn’t worked! Any other suggestions?

image700×313 15.4 KB

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

This is the correct way to set it up.

This automation will only trigger at the time specified in the “1 day after” module. To test this automation, please set the due date to yesterday and set the time for one hour in the future, and it should work.

Hope this helps
